title: Page loads successfully
description: Verify the homepage loads without errors

title: All sections render
description: Verify Hero, Services, Projects, Experience, Education, Certifications, Testimonials, Contact, and Footer sections are visible

title: Theme toggle works
description: Click theme toggle and verify colors change

title: Language switcher works
description: Click language toggle and verify content changes between Spanish and English

title: Project images display
description: Verify all project images load correctly

title: WhatsApp link works
description: Verify WhatsApp opens with pre-filled message

title: Responsive design
description: Verify page displays correctly on mobile viewport
